overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game showing a teenage girl and young boy walking through a sunlit Mediterranean coastal village. They meet a guide character and proceed to a large stone bird statue overlooking the sea, with rocky cliffs and historic stone architecture throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic stone courtyard with cypress trees

events.description: approaching and passing through stone archway exiting the courtyard

agents.ego_description: Amicia holding Hugo's hand while walking steadily through the courtyard toward the archway exit

entered.detail: tall stone wall with weathered texture and terracotta roof tiles above
tall narrow evergreen tree in the courtyard center
arched stone doorway leading out of the courtyard
simple wooden bench sitting against the courtyard wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit stone courtyard with cobblestone ground and tall cypress trees. The camera follows two characters, a teenage girl and young boy, walking hand-in-hand toward a stone archway exit. The walls are constructed of weathered stone with terracotta roof tiles visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with wooden shelter and flag poles

events.description: exits enclosed courtyard into open coastal area with panoramic sea view
meets guide character who joins the group and leads them forward

agents.ego_description: Amicia and Hugo walking alongside the guide woman across the stone overlook toward the coastal path

notable_agents.action: guide character with curly hair and yellow vest walking ahead and gesturing toward the path

entered.detail: open-air wooden pavilion with roof supported by vertical posts
tall wooden poles with yellow and black fabric banners waving in wind
stone windmill structures visible on the distant coastline
open view of the sea and distant coastline beyond the path

segments.scene_description: The group emerges from the courtyard onto a wide stone overlook with panoramic coastal views. A wooden shelter with flag poles stands to the right while distant windmills dot the coastline. A guide character joins the two protagonists, leading them forward along the path as they walk together toward the sea.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal path descending toward shoreline

events.description: transition from paved stone overlook to narrow rocky dirt trail
guide character runs ahead toward the village area below

agents.ego_description: Amicia and Hugo carefully walking down the rocky descending path following the guide

notable_agents.action: guide running ahead down the path toward the village houses below

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall with layered stone formations
low stone wall lining the right side of the path
cluster of stone houses with terracotta roofs in the distance
simple wooden post fence along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a rocky trail descending between a steep cliff face on the left and a stone wall on the right. The ground transitions from paved stone to dirt and gravel. The guide runs ahead toward a cluster of village houses visible in the distance while the two protagonists follow carefully down the incline.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop stone platform with large bird statue overlooking village

events.description: approaching the large stone eagle statue on the circular platform
stopping to look up at the stone statue while the guide gestures toward the landscape

agents.ego_description: Amicia and Hugo stopping at the statue platform to look up at the stone eagle while the guide stands nearby

notable_agents.action: guide standing beside the statue gesturing toward the mountain and coastal view

entered.detail: large weathered stone statue of an eagle or bird of prey perched on a circular pedestal
circular stone platform with steps leading up to the statue
tall jagged mountain peak rising behind the statue

segments.scene_description: The group reaches a circular stone platform featuring a massive weathered eagle statue overlooking the village and coast. The camera circles the statue as the characters gather around it, looking up at the stone bird against the backdrop of a jagged mountain peak and blue sky. The guide gestures toward the landscape while the two protagonists observe the monument.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded stone courtyard out toward a panoramic coastal overlook and down to a monumental statue. It begins by following a teenage girl and young boy hand-in-hand through a sunlit courtyard of cobblestones and cypress trees, moving steadily toward a weathered stone archway. As they emerge from the arch, the scene opens into a wide overlook featuring a wooden shelter and distant windmills, where a guide joins the group and leads them toward the sea. The path then narrows and shifts from paved stone to a gravelly trail, descending between a steep cliff face and a stone wall toward a cluster of distant village houses. Finally, the camera reaches a circular platform and circles a massive weathered eagle statue, framing the characters against a backdrop of jagged mountain peaks and a clear blue sky.
